gist.headline: Dreams in the hive
gist.blurb: DREAMMELD just landed in our app showcase! It combines AI dream interpretation, imagery, and ambient sound to bring your subconscious to life.
gist.summary: Added DREAMMELD, an AI dream interpretation and visualization app, to the community showcase.
gist.impact: Users can now discover DREAMMELD in the app directory, and the creator's Flower tier status has been restored.
gist.visual_concept: The PR is about a dream interpretation app. Depict Polly the bee sleeping and dreaming, with dream-like elements (clouds, stars, musical notes) to represent the app's imagery and ambient sound features.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot sleeping peacefully on a fluffy cloud, wearing a tiny nightcap. Above her head, a glowing thought bubble shows a magical dreamscape with floating pixelated stars and musical notes. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
